create_deposit.title: Creating a Deposit
create_deposit.description: Walk through the donations deposit workflow.

steps.message: Open the Donations module from the sidebar.
Switch to the Deposits screen.
Use the create controls to start a new deposit record.

manage_contacts.title: Managing Contacts
manage_contacts.description: Guide for reviewing and updating contact profiles.

steps.message: Open Contacts from the sidebar.
Use filters and list controls to locate a contact.

newsletter_campaign.title: Launching a Newsletter Campaign
newsletter_campaign.description: Guide for creating and sending a newsletter campaign.

steps.message: Open Newsletter from the sidebar.
Go to Campaigns.
Use the campaign actions to draft, test, and queue a send.

finance_reconciliation.title: Reconciling Accounts
finance_reconciliation.description: Guide for reviewing ledger balances against statements.

steps.message: Open Finance from the sidebar.
Open Reconcile.
Review statement balance, timing items, and follow-up notes before saving the reconciliation.

finance_gl_entry.title: Creating a GL Entry
finance_gl_entry.description: Guide for opening the GL entry workflow and entering balanced lines.

steps.message: You are in the GL Entry area. Use this section for journal and ledger entries.
Start a new GL entry from the Quick GL Entry action.
Review the entry list and confirm debits, credits, memo, and date before saving or submitting.

donations_create_donation.title: Recording a Donation
donations_create_donation.description: Guide for finding the donation entry workflow and preparing a gift record.

steps.message: This is the donation transactions workflow where gift entry and deposit batch work begins.
Use the sidebar filters to confirm you are on the right transaction set before entering or reviewing a donation.
Use the main transaction table to review gifts and batch-ready rows, then continue the donation workflow from here.

donations_edit_donation.title: Editing a Donation
donations_edit_donation.description: Guide for locating an existing donation and opening its detail record for review or change.

steps.message: Start by narrowing the transaction list so you can find the correct donation quickly.
Open the matching donation row from the transaction list to review its current status and detail record.

website_publish_page.title: Publishing a Website Page
website_publish_page.description: Guide for locating page actions and reviewing the publish workflow.

steps.message: Start from the Website pages list so you can create, edit, or publish the correct page record.
Use the page actions here to create a draft, open the editor, or publish an existing page.
Confirm the page status and choose the matching action for draft, edit, or publish.

calendar_create_event.title: Creating a Calendar Event
calendar_create_event.description: Guide for locating the calendar creation controls.

steps.message: Use the calendar toolbar to confirm the correct calendar and date range first.
Start the event workflow from the New Event button.

people_create_user.title: Creating a User
people_create_user.description: Guide for opening the People list and adding a new person record.

steps.message: Start on the People list and use search first if you want to confirm the person does not already exist.
Start the new person workflow from Add Person.
Enter first name, last name, and email, then save the record before assigning roles or workspace access.

people_find_person.title: Finding a Person
people_find_person.description: Guide for using the People dashboard search to locate a person record.

steps.message: Search by last name, email, or PID to narrow directly to the right person record.
Choose the best match from the live results to open the full person profile.

people_assign_role.title: Assigning a Role
people_assign_role.description: Guide for locating people, roles, and access tools.

steps.message: Start by locating the person record you want to review or update.
Open the matching role or access tool from these people workspace shortcuts.

reports_run_report.title: Running a Report
reports_run_report.description: Guide for choosing report filters and launching the report workflow.

steps.message: Use the report action to generate the current report after confirming the visible filters.
Review the report filters and period settings here before rerunning with a different scope.

reports_export_report.title: Exporting a Report
reports_export_report.description: Guide for exporting the currently rendered report.

steps.message: Use the export controls here after the report has rendered successfully.
If the export controls are hidden, run the report first and wait for the results to finish loading.

settings_save_settings.title: Saving Settings
settings_save_settings.description: Guide for checking the form section and saving the current settings page.

steps.message: Review the visible settings section and make sure all required values are complete before saving.
Save the current settings section from this action area.

drive_upload_file.title: Uploading a File
drive_upload_file.description: Guide for selecting the right Drive location and starting a file upload.

steps.message: Confirm you are in the correct folder before uploading so the file lands in the right place.
Start the upload from this button.

drive_find_file.title: Finding a File
drive_find_file.description: Guide for searching the Drive view and locating the current file list.

steps.message: Search by file name first to narrow the current Drive view.
Review the filtered file list here and open the best match.
